title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to zero-based budgeting and budget transparency.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, January 15, 2026 -- The committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2221) of Bruce E. Tarr for legislation relative to zero-based budgeting and budget transparency, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2909).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
